item.title: Women’s safety and justice
item.description: INTERNATIONAL Women’s Day is a day to challenge the conscience of society. It reminds us that women’s rights, dignity and safety are neither acts of benevolence nor favours. They are fundamental moral demands of human civilisation. The reality is that women have had to struggle for the basic rights for centuries. Through the darkness of discrimination, humiliation......Breaking news alerts

And as I sat with that this morning — as a woman, as a humanitarian — I found I couldn’t separate my own reflection from the faces of the women and girls I see every day in the camps of Cox’s Bazar. item.title: Rights, justice and action for all women and girls

It signals that gender equality is not only about recognition or aspiration but also about enforceable rights, accountable justice systems, and concrete action that reaches every woman and girl without......

item.title: Economic equality for women

It is a world of unprecedented technological leaps, echoing with the triumphs of artificial intelligence. Yet, a poignant question remains: in this age of digital supremacy, have we truly attained the pinnacle of human equality?......

item.title: Structural change for women
